The '''Wraiths''' were a unit of elite [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] within<ref name="Galaxies" /> the radical [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] splinter group<ref name="HotM">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> known as the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]]. Clad in [[Silver/Legends|silver]]-[[Color/Legends|white]] [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]], the Wraiths were based out of the [[Death/Legends|Death]] Watch's [[Death Watch bunker|hidden bunker]] on the [[Tree/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The Death Watch Wraith [[Fenri Dalso]] was tasked with overseeing the entrance to the [[alum]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]] at the base, while Dalso's fellow Wraith [[Klin Nif]] was charged with regulating access to Section B of the Death Watch's bunker. Around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], numerous Wraiths engaged several [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who attempted to intrude into the base. Dalso and Nif were both killed during the incursion, and their individual [[Keycard/Legends|pass keys]] taken by the spacers to gain access to the areas formerly under their oversight.<ref name="Galaxies" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Wraiths first appeared in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', beginning with its updated release, ''An Empire Divided''.
